title: Rosetta Bridge
description: Schema for cross-domain bridge definitions linking sibling repos to Rosetta shapes, families, and sensors.

id.description: Unique bridge identifier in BRIDGE.NAME format.

version.description: Semantic version of the bridge definition.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this bridge connects.

source_repo.description: The sibling repository this bridge connects to. Can be an object with name/url/ref or a short string identifier.

target.description: Target anchor in Rosetta (shape, family, or principle).

mappings.description: Domain-specific mappings between source and target.

sources.description: Named source references for the bridge data.
